extract: Flabébé (Japanese: フラベベ Flabebe) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Floette starting at level 19, which evolves into Florges when exposed to a Shiny Stone. Flabébé also has five separate forms, each named for the color of its flower: Red Flower, Yellow Flower, Orange Flower, Blue Flower, and White Flower.
